title: RalphFoundryRunManifest
description: Input contract for one Ralph Foundry run. JSON Schema is the source of truth for manifest shape.

epicRef.description: Epic reference from the planning source of truth.

storyRef.description: Story reference from the planning source of truth.

mode.description: dry-run validates contract flow without code changes; real-execution is bounded execution with HITL gating.

validationCommands.description: Commands that verify the run result.

contextPaths.description: Optional local context files to load before execution.

extensions.description: Optional extension point for non-core integrations. v0.1 keeps external systems out of the base contract.

breakingChangePolicy.const: Only patch-level bumps are non-breaking; minor bumps require a migration step.

deprecationDate.description: Date after which this schema version may be removed when superseded.
